services.label: Chancela API server

controllable_actions.limitation: The current API process cannot start another copy of itself.
The current API process cannot stop itself through this request.
Restart requires an external supervisor or process relaunch.

limitations: The API can observe this process as running only because it is serving this request.
Start, stop, and restart require an external supervisor or process relaunch.

services.label: Chancela MCP stdio server

controllable_actions.limitation: The stdio MCP server is launched externally; the API can only record desired state.
The stdio MCP server is launched externally; the API can only record desired state.
The stdio MCP server is launched externally; the API can only record desired state.

limitations: The stdio MCP server is launched by an external client or supervisor; the API cannot observe or spawn that process.
No MCP API key or other secret is exposed through this status surface.
Tenant AI/MCP gate settings.ai.enabled is false; a launcher must mirror it before MCP can serve.
